description: You are a Museum Facility Planner designing an Art Conservation Laboratory in a newly acquired commercial space. Transform the existing building shell in Sweet Home 3D into a specialized conservation lab with four distinct zones: a Dirty Treatment Area, a Clean Inpainting Area, a Quarantine/Art Storage room, and a Photography Documentation bay. Your design must include at least four new partition walls to divide the space and at least four defined rooms with descriptive names. Apply distinct floor colors or textures to at least two of these rooms to differentiate functional zones. Furnish the Dirty Treatment Area with at least two sinks and two large workbenches. Equip the Clean Inpainting Area with at least three desks, three chairs, and four lamps. The Quarantine/Storage room must be enclosed with at least one door and furnished with at least five shelving units or storage cabinets. Generate a 3D photo of the completed laboratory layout and save it to /home/ga/Desktop/conservation_lab_render.png. Save the project file upon completion.

metadata.industry: Museums, Historical Sites, and Similar Institutions
